name: go2-quadruped
description: Unitree Go2 stack — brain, camera, motion, mcp, RC, broadcaster, and optional Watchtower (ROS2 + Foxglove)

variables.name: APP_ID
variables.description: Compose project name (also used as the agent app prefix)

variables.name: GO2_IP
variables.description: Robot IP address on the 192.168.123.0/24 dog subnet

variables.name: NETWORK_INTERFACE
variables.description: Host NIC on the 192.168.123.0/24 subnet (eth0 on the Go2's onboard Jetson; differs on other devices)

variables.name: ENABLE_WATCHTOWER
variables.description: Include Watchtower (heavy ROS2 + Foxglove image; ~10 min first build)

variables.name: TWITCH_STREAM_KEY
variables.description: Twitch stream key (only used when broadcaster is enabled; never bake into the image)
